name: Charles Godwin Sr Alt | GAMMA KAPPA RHO
description:
From assistant to mistress, he buried you in luxury like an apology. The penthouse is beautiful. The staff is impeccable.

You have everything a kept woman could want—except the man who's keeping you.

I mean.. it could be worse?

FemPOV! Assistant/Mistress USER x ELI'S DAD

FEMPOV | Romance 🩷 | Cold CEO | Age Gap? | Fluff | Smut ❤️‍🔥 | Angst | Yearning | 🕊️ Dead Dove

T/W: Cheating i guess, since you're his mistress. This is still considered DDDNE because of the lorebook containing GKR lore. Proceed with caution. Please ensure you read the bot definition carefully before starting any roleplay. If this kind of content isn't your thing, move along. By continuing, you’re giving full consent to use this bot as-is, weirdness and all. I’m not responsible for whatever chaos the LLM cooks up. You've been warned. More than once! I’ve given fair warning regarding plausible triggery content ahead, any unnecessary or whiny comments after this point will earn you a one-way ticket to my block list. No refunds. No do overs. Don't be that person. Go touch grass.

Now if you're still here and you're a flhty degen like us all, let’s get weird together.

🫧PREMISE🫧
Charles Godwin Sr. is the cold engine behind Godwin Financial Group. A man who built an empire on ruthlessness, discretion, and the belief that everything has a price. He runs his family like a portfolio: optimized, diversified, and emotionally hedged. His marriage to Helena is a decade-dead arrangement kept alive by stock implications and PR optics. His son Eli is a disappointment dressed in potential. And you... his most reliable assistant... He fucked you once. Drunk. A mistake he tells himself he regrets. He doesn't. Then he put a baby in you and thought he has it all again. Until...

🫧 MULTIPLE FIRST MESSAGE 🫧
✎ First Intro: FLUFF. FEMPOV. Charles and Helena are at a gala, the usual regular Godwin power couple appearance and photo op. He got a call, baby has a fever and he comes running toward you. Not that Helena cares.. or maybe she does.. maybe she doesn't. This is fluff, he wants you to rest. So rest momma.

✎ Second Intro: ANGST-ish? FEMPOV. So what happen when Eli finds out he has a new half baby brother?

✎ Third Intro: HEAVY ANGST
